meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Scale Your Freelance Projects Faster
content.seo_description: Stop hitting scaling walls. Learn how to debug with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-quality freelance projects at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck in scaling freelance projects is often manual, repetitive debugging. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for CLI-based remediation, you transform debugging from a reactive chore into an automated, proactive system, allowing you to ship complex features 3x faster without compromising code quality.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, your inbox is flooded with client requests, and a critical bug in your production deployment is eating your profit margins. You are trapped in a cycle of manual triage, unable to scale because every new feature introduces a cascade of regressions. The reality is that your manual debugging process is the primary constraint on your freelance business growth.

But the tide is turning. By leveraging AI-assisted debugging, you move from being a coder fighting fires to an architect directing an autonomous dev team. This isn't just about fixing bugs; it's about building a repeatable, automated system that allows you to ship complex, enterprise-grade applications while you focus on high-value client strategy.

steps.title: Establish Architectural Baseline
steps.description: Before debugging, ensure your project state is indexed and understood by the AI agents.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and identify potential bottlenecks or technical debt that could hinder scaling.

steps.title: Automated Error Triage
steps.description: Pipe your error logs directly into the AI to identify patterns rather than individual incidents.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the recent error logs provided. Group them by root cause and prioritize them based on system stability impact.

steps.title: Context-Aware Refactoring
steps.description: Use AI to rewrite problematic modules that cause recurring bugs during scaling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the authentication module to be stateless, ensuring it can handle concurrent scaling without session leakage.

steps.title: Synthesize Unit Test Suites
steps.description: Auto-generate tests for the newly refactored code to prevent regressions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive Jest test suite for the auth module that covers edge cases for high-concurrency environments.

steps.title: Continuous Monitoring Integration
steps.description: Finalize the loop by setting up AI-monitored alerts for future regressions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a monitoring config that flags performance degradation patterns before they trigger hard errors.

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with the 'why' behind a design choice to prevent it from refactoring away intentional constraints.
Use Claude Code's `--dry-run` flag before applying mass refactors to verify the AI's logic against your architectural goals.
Maintain a 'system_prompt.md' in your project root to keep the AI aligned with your specific coding standards and boilerplate preferences.
When debugging complex state issues, use Antigravity to visualize the data flow before asking for a code fix.
Treat AI-generated code as a junior developer's pull request: always perform a 60-second 'sanity check' on logic branches before committing.
content.next_steps: Begin by applying these workflows to a single module in your current project. Once you achieve a 20% reduction in bug reports, expand the automation to your deployment pipeline.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your hours for stress. Build a scalable, automated engine that does the heavy lifting for you so you can scale your freelance business to the next level. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
